title.vi: Tu day den ga Seoul bang cach nao?
title.en: How do I get to Seoul Station from here?

subtitle.vi: Mo bai bang tu vung giao thong, khoa lai 에서/까지 va -으십시오/-십시오, roi on bang nghe duong di va bai doc du lich.
subtitle.en: Open with transport vocabulary, lock in 에서/까지 and -으십시오/-십시오, then review with route listening and travel reading.

summary.vi: Tu vung giao thong va mau ngu phap from-to cot loi cua unit.
summary.en: Transport vocabulary and the core from-to grammar of the unit.

summary.vi: Hoi duong, nghe chi duong, va dua phan workbook phuong tien vao main path.
summary.en: Ask for directions, listen to instructions, and fold the first transport workbook lesson into the path.

summary.vi: Ba lesson workbook lien tiep de phu het bai route drill cua sach bai tap.
summary.en: Three workbook lessons in a row to keep the full route drills from the workbook.

summary.vi: Don toan bo bai nghe QR vao mot block rieng de nghe, dien, sap xep, va lap lai.
summary.en: Move every QR listening exercise into its own block for listening, fill, ordering, and speaking follow-up.

summary.vi: Ket unit bang doc hieu va san sinh, khong tron QR vao phan review cuoi.
summary.en: Finish with reading and production, without mixing QR audio back into the final review.

summary.vi: Lam quen voi phuong tien giao thong cot loi va cau hoi trung tam cua bai 16.
summary.en: Start Unit 16 with the core transport words and its central directions question.

explanation.vi: Ket lesson bang cau hoi duong di cot loi.
explanation.en: Close the lesson with the core directions question.

summary.vi: Khoa mau chi diem bat dau va diem ket thuc, dong thoi giu duoc cau hoi thoi gian di lai.

summary.vi: Ghep lai hoi duong, loi chi duong, va cac menh lenh lich su bang -으십시오/-십시오.

prompt.vi: Dich cau tieng Han sang y nghia.

tasks.audioText: 리사: 실례합니다. 여기에서 서울역까지 어떻게 가요? 남자: 저기 정류장에서 100번 버스를 타십시오. 그 버스가 서울역까지 갑니다. 리사: 감사합니다. 그런데 여기에서 서울역까지 많이 멀어요? 남자: 아니요. 멀지 않아요.
